testing.summary: Implemented CLI (cli.mjs) for opencode-codebase-memory with 8 commands: analyze, query, context, impact, detect-changes, list-repos, health, enrich-error. All output is JSON to stdout. Exits 0 on success, 1 on error with JSON error on stderr. Added CODEBASE_MEMORY_STATE_DIR env var support to index.js constructor for test isolation. 18 CLI subprocess tests via Bun.spawn covering all commands, flags, error paths, and unknown command handling.

Implemented CodebaseMemory main class with repo registry for opencode-codebase-memory. Configurable stateDir (constructor param) for test isolation. Methods: analyze() indexes repo via Indexer and registers in repos.json, query() FTS search across symbols, context() returns symbol node + callers/callees, impact() blast radius via recursive CTE, detectChanges() mtime-based change detection, enrichErrorContext() extracts symbol names from error text and looks up across repos, listRepos() enumerates all registered repos. Registry persists to {stateDir}/repos.json. 16 tests covering all methods including persistence, error handling, and edge cases.

Implemented Indexer class for opencode-codebase-memory with incremental change detection via SHA256 content hashing. Walks directory trees, skips IGNORE_DIRS (node_modules, .git, dist, etc.), indexes supported JS/TS files via parser, stores nodes/edges/files in GraphStore. Re-indexing unchanged files is skipped. 5 tests covering directory indexing, incremental skip, modified file re-index, IGNORE_DIRS filtering, and getStats.

Config coherence script now handles enriched JSON files (e.g., opencode.json with MCP path resolution) via structural comparison of non-enriched keys instead of SHA256 hash. Added ENRICHED_JSON_FILES map, deepEqual(), and compareEnrichedJson(). Unblocks protocol-compliance-pass.mjs.

Reconciled MCP boundary docs and config with active runtime policy: aligned opencode-mcp-config.json dormant entries with mcp-dormant-policy.json, rewrote server-list.md to remove stale tavily/github entries and add 3 active internal wrappers plus dormant section, updated setup-instructions.md to reflect active internal MCP wrappers, added canonical source-of-truth note to cli-mcp-surface-policy.md, and extended mcp-inventory-regression tests to assert dormant/active alignment across config files.

Config coherence wave: added machine identity (getMachineId with persistent .machine-id.json), audit logging (appendAuditEntry writing NDJSON with 1MB rotation), version manifest tracking (writeConfigManifest in copy-config.mjs, readConfigManifest in validate-config-coherence.mjs), and cross-machine warning detection. CLI now appends audit entries on every coherence check.

Fixed multi-process race condition in state-machine.js _persistTransition() by adding atomic compare-and-swap verification inside BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction. Reads current DB state after acquiring write lock, throws STALE_STATE error on mismatch. Added regression test using dual StateMachine instances with deferred() gating.

(2) system-health.mjs: added auditCodebaseMemory() function that loads CodebaseMemory, lists indexed repos, opens GraphStore for each repo to get node/edge stats, returns DORMANT if no repos indexed, HEALTHY if nodes>0, UNKNOWN if package unavailable (expected in Node.js context). Methods: analyze() indexes repo via Indexer and registers in repos.json, query() FTS search across symbols, context() returns symbol node + callers/callees, impact() blast radius via recursive CTE, detectChanges() mtime-based change detection, enrichErrorContext() extracts symbol names from error text and looks up across repos, listRepos() enumerates all registered repos. Registry persists to {stateDir}/repos.json. 16 tests covering all methods including persistence, error handling, and edge cases.

Walks directory trees, skips IGNORE_DIRS (node_modules, .git, dist, etc.), indexes supported JS/TS files via parser, stores nodes/edges/files in GraphStore. Re-indexing unchanged files is skipped. 5 tests covering directory indexing, incremental skip, modified file re-index, IGNORE_DIRS filtering, and getStats.

Implemented JS/TS AST parser for opencode-codebase-memory using @typescript-eslint/typescript-estree. Extracts function declarations, class/method declarations, call expressions as edges, and import edges. Gracefully handles unparseable files. 5 tests covering all extraction types and error handling.

Implemented GraphStore class for opencode-codebase-memory: SQLite-backed symbol/edge/file storage with FTS5 full-text search, recursive CTE blast radius analysis, WAL mode, and prepared statements. 6 tests covering schema init, CRUD, FTS search, transitive caller traversal, and file metadata.

packages/opencode-codebase-memory.summary: Implemented CLI (cli.mjs) for opencode-codebase-memory with 8 commands: analyze, query, context, impact, detect-changes, list-repos, health, enrich-error. All output is JSON to stdout. Exits 0 on success, 1 on error with JSON error on stderr. Added CODEBASE_MEMORY_STATE_DIR env var support to index.js constructor for test isolation. 18 CLI subprocess tests via Bun.spawn covering all commands, flags, error paths, and unknown command handling.

Implemented CodebaseMemory main class with repo registry for opencode-codebase-memory. Configurable stateDir (constructor param) for test isolation. Methods: analyze() indexes repo via Indexer and registers in repos.json, query() FTS search across symbols, context() returns symbol node + callers/callees, impact() blast radius via recursive CTE, detectChanges() mtime-based change detection, enrichErrorContext() extracts symbol names from error text and looks up across repos, listRepos() enumerates all registered repos. Registry persists to {stateDir}/repos.json. 16 tests covering all methods including persistence, error handling, and edge cases.

Implemented Indexer class for opencode-codebase-memory with incremental change detection via SHA256 content hashing. Walks directory trees, skips IGNORE_DIRS (node_modules, .git, dist, etc.), indexes supported JS/TS files via parser, stores nodes/edges/files in GraphStore. Re-indexing unchanged files is skipped. 5 tests covering directory indexing, incremental skip, modified file re-index, IGNORE_DIRS filtering, and getStats.

Implemented JS/TS AST parser for opencode-codebase-memory using @typescript-eslint/typescript-estree. Extracts function declarations, class/method declarations, call expressions as edges, and import edges. Gracefully handles unparseable files. 5 tests covering all extraction types and error handling.

Implemented GraphStore class for opencode-codebase-memory: SQLite-backed symbol/edge/file storage with FTS5 full-text search, recursive CTE blast radius analysis, WAL mode, and prepared statements. 6 tests covering schema init, CRUD, FTS search, transitive caller traversal, and file metadata.

ALWAYS use systematic-debugging skill. Read errors fully before editing. Triggered when attempt_number >= 3 on same file (packages/opencode-learning-engine/src/orchestration-advisor.js:441)
Intentional for idempotent logging (packages/opencode-model-manager/src/lifecycle/audit-logger.js:295). Do NOT change to UPDATE.
